questions.question: Explain two advantages and two disadvantages of agent-based log collection.
expectedPoints: Advantage: Comprehensive data collection with offline caching capabilities
Disadvantage: Deployment and maintenance overhead on each endpoint
Disadvantage: Potential performance impact on host systems

questions.question: Describe the log normalization process and explain why it is essential for effective security monitoring in a SIEM system.
expectedPoints: Definition: Conversion of diverse log formats into standardized structure
Step 1: Extraction of key fields from raw log data
Step 2: Classification of event types (authentication, network, etc.)
Step 3: Tagging with metadata for easier searching
Importance: Enables consistent analysis across different systems
Importance: Facilitates correlation of events from multiple sources
Importance: Improves search performance and accuracy
